title: Refactor function-head soup into discriminating head + body destructure
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/function_head_soup.ex has a handle_event/3 whose head binds 7 params + 2 assigns. Rewrite lib/my_app_web/live/settings_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SettingsLive) so handle_event("validate", %{"settings" => params}, socket) takes ONLY the discriminating "validate" + the top-level %{"settings" => ...} + socket. All field destructuring happens in the function body. Do not bind the current_user in the function head. The behavior is preserved.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing the anti-pattern and refactoring without changing behavior. Sonnet often keeps too much in the head.
research_citation: John Elm Labs anti-patterns: 'Function Head Pattern Matching Abuse'
